title: Trials of the Blood Dragon

notes: Game won't successfully launch.  When launching from Steam app the UPlay DRM program never launches to authenticate.  By using Wine commands within the associated Wineprefix UPlay program can be launched, updated and completes authentication over the network and detects a local version of Trials of the Blood Dragon installed, but it can't successfully launch the game.  Even with UPlay app pre-launched and with authentication successful neither Steam app or UPlay app can launch the game.
title: Trials of the Blood Dragon
